result:
[[B1]]

to: Dan Marsh <info@example.com>
subject: Snowcap, and a hello from down the hill

Dan,

Sam here, from Hillside Farm. We met at the Coastal Collective exchange at the tower. I keep thinking about the Snowcap story, the white whale and the trademark that got away.

It only clicked afterwards that we're more or less neighbours: Hillside Farm sits at the foot of your mountain, over at the foothills. If you and the family ever fancy a day among the horses and the animals, come out, you'd be very welcome and no occasion needed.

Sam
